article.p: MetaOWL uses OWL (Odoo Web Library) components for building your UI.

h2.style: font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--doc-heading-color); margin-top: 32px; margin-bottom: 16px;

article.p: Create components in the src/components/ directory:

pre.style: padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 24px;

h2.style: font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--doc-heading-color); margin-top: 32px; margin-bottom: 16px;

article.p: Define the component template in an XML file:

pre.style: padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 24px;

h2.style: font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--doc-heading-color); margin-top: 32px; margin-bottom: 16px;

ul.style: color: var(--doc-text-color); margin-bottom: 16px; list-style: disc; padding-left: 24px;

h2.style: font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--doc-heading-color); margin-top: 32px; margin-bottom: 16px;

div.class: bg-gray-100 dark:bg-[#1e202e] border border-gray-300 dark:border-none rounded-lg p-6 mb-8
div.p: This example shows a simple OWL component with props and event handling.

input.class: px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-700 rounded-md bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-100 text-sm

button.t-attf-class: px-4 py-2 text-base font-medium text-white border-none rounded-md cursor-pointer transition-all hover:opacity-90 {{ state.buttonStyle === 'primary' ? 'bg-blue-500' : 'bg-violet-500' }}

button.class: px-4 py-2 bg-gray-500 text-white border-none rounded-md cursor-pointer text-sm font-medium hover:bg-gray-600 transition-colors
px-4 py-2 bg-red-500 text-white border-none rounded-md cursor-pointer text-sm font-medium hover:bg-red-600 transition-colors
